user_prompt: `handle_info` should automatically trigger a ajax request to `/list_files.json`, which is served by `WebFileHandlers::sendMicroSdFileList`, the result should unhide and populate `#files_test` after using `make_rows_from_template`
agent_reply: Done. `handle_info(info)` now calls `fetch_file_list()` after finishing the existing info/security setup.
- cached file-row template so empty file lists don’t destroy the reusable template
- hides `#files_please_wait` and unhides `#files_test` when the list renders
